data.content: Implemented the approved printf fallback fix in scripts/setup.sh and scripts/agent-wizard.sh by changing prompt icon output from printf '->' to printf '%s' '->', which prevents bash from treating the arrow as an option. Validation in worktree /private/tmp/foolery-9df0: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bash -n scripts/setup.sh; bash -n scripts/agent-wizard.sh; rg "printf '\\-" scripts (no matches); bun run lint (pre-existing warnings only, 0 errors); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build. Branch: feat/foolery-9df0. Commit: 491c740c0829.
